body: On the Wordpress plugin, you'll first need to update to InstantSearch v2. It comes with InstantSearch v1 which doesn't have that feature

Thanks for the reply, could you hint me how to update InstantSearch to v2? I did enqueue (include) latest instantsearch.js file from [cdn](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/getting-started.html#from-a-cdn) in my functions file, and it does load (can be found in view source code of the page).

I'm not super familiar with how wordpress works, but changing the cdn to be v2, and changing the few things in the widgets is indeed what needs to be done. Can you give the code and error you're getting somehow?
